title: No Server Names
description: Removes the "Minecraft Server" title when you add a new server.
body:
Most servers contain the names in their MOTDs. This makes it pointless to enter their names yourself when adding a server to your list. Therefore, players often just ignore the server name field. Thus, they have all servers in their list with the name "Minecraft Server".

This resourcepack makes the server name field empty.

**But this only works when adding a new server. The names of old servers will remain the same.**
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/prKPqGJC/images/77ec32ea947fee8c917541c010c7f8aaacbd9ddc.png)
